'''shathupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackdown|smackdown]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackdown|smackdown]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shathupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæthipith|shæthipith]] || [[word:shæthipij|shæthipij]] || [[word:shæthipish|shæthipish]] || [[word:shæthipi|shæthipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathuthuputh|shathuthuputh]] || [[word:shathuthupuj|shathuthupuj]] || [[word:shathuthupush|shathuthupush]] || [[word:shathuthupu|shathuthupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathuputh|shathuputh]] || [[word:shathupuj|shathupuj]] || [[word:shathupush|shathupush]] || [[word:shathupu|shathupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathufputh|shathufputh]] || [[word:shathufpuj|shathufpuj]] || [[word:shathufpush|shathufpush]] || [[word:shathufpuf|shathufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shathuputhu|shathuputhu]] || [[word:shathupuju|shathupuju]] || [[word:shathupushu|shathupushu]] || [[word:shathupuku|shathupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shathuputh|shathuputh]] || [[word:shathupuj|shathupuj]] || [[word:shathupush|shathupush]] || [[word:shathupu|shathupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shathuputhul|shathuputhul]] || [[word:shathupujul|shathupujul]] || [[word:shathupushul|shathupushul]] || [[word:shathupukul|shathupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shathuputhuthu|shathuputhuthu]] || [[word:shathupujuju|shathupujuju]] || [[word:shathupushushu|shathupushushu]] || [[word:shathupuku|shathupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shathuputhun|shathuputhun]] || [[word:shathupujun|shathupujun]] || [[word:shathupushun|shathupushun]] || [[word:shathupukun|shathupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shathuputhuoro|shathuputhuoro]] || [[word:shathupujuoro|shathupujuoro]] || [[word:shathupushuoro|shathupushuoro]] || [[word:shathupukuoro|shathupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
